name: calendar
visual_summary: A calendar component that displays a grid of dates. Developers would use it for displaying and navigating between months.
generation_prompt:

Style: flat, responsive

Tags: calendar, date, time, schedule

- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly

- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
